talents.name: Foreign Fieldcleaver
talents.description:
Normal Attack
Performs up to 5 rapid strikes.

Charged Attack
Consumes a certain amount of Stamina to unleash 2 rapid sword strikes.

Plunging Attack
Plunges from mid-air to strike the ground below, damaging opponents along the path and dealing AoE DMG upon impact.

talents.name: Razorgrass Blade
talents.description:
With a flourish of your blade, you unleash a spray of razor-sharp leaves that go before you and deal Dendro DMG.

You and Paimon observed the flowing edges of grass and leaf.

talents.name: Surgent Manifestation
talents.description:
Calling upon the might of the flora all around you, you create a Lea Lotus Lamp.
This Lamp will deal continuous Dendro DMG to opponents within its AoE.

Lotuslight Transfiguration
The Lea Lotus Lamp will undergo the following changes after it comes into contact with Hydro/Electro/Pyro:
·Hydro: the Lamp's AoE and the AoE of its attacks are increased.
·Electro: the Lamp's ATK SPD is increased.
·Pyro: the Lamp will explode after a short delay and then disappear, dealing AoE Dendro DMG.
The Lea Lotus Lamp can only undergo one Lotuslight Transfiguration in its duration.

Only one Lamp created by the Traveler can exist at any one time.

You and Paimon studied the sounds of plants that sprout after the rain.

talents.name: Verdant Overgrowth
talents.description: Lea Lotus Lamp will obtain one level of Overflowing Lotuslight every second it is on the field, increasing the Elemental Mastery of active character(s) within its AoE by 6. Overflowing Lotuslight has a maximum of 10 stacks.

talents.name: Verdant Luxury
talents.description: Every point of Elemental Mastery the Traveler possesses increases the DMG dealt by Razorgrass Blade by 0.15% and the DMG dealt by Surgent Manifestation by 0.1%.

talents.name: Foreign Verdalume
talents.description:
Draw new strength from journeys past. For every element you have resonated with, you gain additional buffs. 

Additionally, when Dendro Cores (including Bountiful Cores, Seeds of Deceit) appear nearby on the field, or when the party obtains Verdant Dew, Traveler will receive 1 stack of Blade of Verdant Viridis. These two methods can each grant the Traveler up to 1 stack of Blade of Verdant Viridis every 4s, max 3 stacks. After obtaining 3 stacks of Blade of Verdant Viridis, performing a Charged Attack will consume all stacks of Blade of Verdant Viridis and transform into the special Charged Attack: Verdessence.

Charged Attack: Verdessence
· Each Charged Attack hit deals increased Dendro DMG. The increase in DMG is equal to 80% of Traveler's ATK. Two Vinecores will also be created on the spot, which will explode after 4/8s respectively, inflicting Dendro DMG equal to 120% of Traveler's ATK. This DMG is considered Charged Attack DMG.
· Charged Attack: Verdessence can be triggered up to once every 15s.
